subTitle: Showcasing high-performance, SEO-optimized web applications and full-stack solutions built with React, Next.js, and modern technologies.

featured.title: ShadowSuite - Cybersecurity Marketplace
featured.subtitle: Next.js Cybersecurity E-commerce Platform
featured.description: ShadowSuite is a premium, secure cybersecurity marketplace built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. It provides a professional environment for exploring and purchasing advanced penetration testing tools, featuring real-time WhatsApp integration and optimized product visibility.
features: Architected a secure marketplace for specialized cybersecurity software.
Integrated instant customer support via WhatsApp API.
Implemented SEO-friendly dynamic routing for product pages.

projects.title: ElectroPak – Smart Electronics Hub
features: Developed a scalable full-stack marketplace for engineering components.
Engineered a mobile-responsive UI with React.js and Tailwind CSS.
Built a robust REST API backend using Node.js and Express.
Integrated real-time data sync with MySQL and Firebase services.

projects.title: HealthHub - Healthcare Consulting Portal
features: Designed a professional medical-themed interface for consultants.
Optimized for high accessibility and mobile responsiveness.
Focused on patient-centric UX and readable clinic profiles.

projects.title: AutoCare Service Hub - Automobile Landing Page
features: Strategic automobile service landing page for higher conversions.
Interactive service sections and intuitive contact forms.
Modern aesthetic with performance-optimized asset loading.

projects.title: Royal Hotel - Luxury Hospitality Website
features: Premium hotel landing page showcasing luxury accommodations.
Elegant room categories and seamless booking call-to-actions.
Aesthetic UI focused on hospitality brand storytelling.

projects.title: IU University Clone - Academic Landing Page
features: Pixel-perfect recreation of a modern university website.
Comprehensive sections for courses, admissions, and campus life.
Optimized for readability and institutional branding.

projects.title: Modern Admin Dashboard - Frontend Framework
features: Responsive admin panel with modern data visualization components.
Clean, modular UI design for enterprise-level management.
Optimized performance with React state management.

projects.title: Figma-to-Code Conversion - Design to React
features: Transformed complex Figma designs into high-quality semantic code.
Focused on maintaining visual integrity and responsive flow.
Clean, maintainable HTML/CSS architecture.

projects.title: Elite Fashion Blog - Aesthetic Layout
features: Modern fashion blog layout with a focus on visual storytelling.
Elegant typography and whitespace management for readability.
Fully responsive design for mobile fashion enthusiasts.

fullStackProjects.title: Basit Sanitary Store - Full Stack E-commerce
fullStackProjects.subtitle: Professional Hardware & Sanitary Solutions
fullStackProjects.description: A robust full-stack e-commerce solution for hardware products. Features advanced product filtering, secure user authentication, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for sales and inventory tracking.
features: End-to-end shopping experience with secure cart and checkout.
Full-featured admin panel for inventory and sales analytics.
RESTful API integration with a secure MySQL database.
Real-time image management and authentication via Firebase.

fullStackProjects.title: ElectroPak – Integrated Electronics Ecosystem
features: Architected a multi-platform ecosystem for electronics enthusiasts.
Unified backend for web and mobile using Node.js and MySQL.
Optimized frontend for SEO and fast asset loading.
Integrated real-time project management and community features.
